# CalmsToolkit

Linux Go module providing one `calmstoolkit` executable.

## Command/runtime boundaries

- `cmd/calmstoolkit/main.go`: the only process entrypoint and only permitted `os.Exit`.
- `internal/cli`: Cobra registration, flag precedence, validation, exit mapping.
- `internal/app`: injected context, I/O, logger, clock, HTTP factory, terminal capabilities.
- `internal/console`: output modes, ANSI-safe primitives, machine envelopes.
- `internal/config`: compatible JSON config, environment overlays, aggregate validation, atomic saves.
- `internal/httputil`: bounded/retrying/redacted HTTP foundation.
- `internal/{streams,calendar,requests,airtime,feed,anisearch}`: feature behavior.

Use `make check`. Do not add standalone binaries or package-local console frameworks. See `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/ADDING_A_TOOL.md`, and `docs/user/CLI_SPEC.md`.
